assertions.assertion: Adds or references the Duende.IdentityServer.Configuration NuGet package
Calls AddIdentityServerConfiguration() on the service collection
Calls MapDynamicClientRegistration() to map the DCR endpoint
Mentions that DCR requires Business Edition or higher license
assertions.rationale: No mention of Business Edition license requirement anywhere in the response

assertions.assertion: The MapDynamicClientRegistration() call includes RequireAuthorization() or the response warns about securing the endpoint
assertions.rationale: Shows RequireAuthorization('some-policy') and warns about securing the endpoint
